Name:
LU 113 - Landmarks, NEW, APPROXIMATELY 801-SEAT HIGH 
SCHOOL WITH DISTRICT 75 PROGRAM, Staten Island (G 260002 SCR).
Title: Resolution approving the site plan for a new, approximately, 801-Seat High School with District 75 program located at 25 Wall Street (Block 10, Lot 1), Community District 1, Borough of Staten Island (Non-ULURP No. G 260002 SCR; Preconsidered L.U. No. 113).

History.Description: This Resolution was Approved by Committee
